data.arabic_text: ((مَنْ قَالَ: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ غُرِسَتْ لَهُ نَخْلَةٌ فِي الْجَنَّةِ)).
data.english_text: (Jabbir  related that the Prophet  said: ‘Whoever says: (How perfect Allah is . The Supreme, and I praise Him.) a palm tree is planted for him in paradise.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Jabbir  related that the Prophet  said: ‘Whoever says: (Subhanal-lahil-AAatheemi wabihamdih.) a palm tree is planted for him in paradise.)
